docket_entries.description: REQUEST THAT CLERK ENTER JUDGMENT ON FINAL ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY PLAINTIFF CENTENO, ENRIQUE AS TO DEFENDANT OCTAVIANO, INC A CALIFORNIA CORPORATION DBA EXCELLENT AUTOMOTIVE SERVICE AND REPAIR JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CENTENO, ENRIQUE RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT OCTAVIANO, INC A CALIFORNIA CORPORATION DBA EXCELLENT AUTOMOTIVE SERVICE AND REPAIR $20,550.60 PRINCIPAL, $28.69 INTEREST, $370.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $20,949.29, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
